name: MiniCPM-V 2.6
license: MiniCPM Model License (custom; free for research and, after registration, commercial use) + Apache-2.0 code
note: 8B MLLM adding multi-image and video understanding on-device, surpassing GPT-4V/Gemini 1.5 Pro on OpenCompass (65.2 avg).

results.notes: MMMU val; the model card marks this figure with an asterisk meaning OpenBMB independently re-ran the officially released checkpoint themselves.

Not in MiniCPM-V 2.6's own results table; taken from the fuller cross-model comparison table on the MiniCPM-o 2.6 model card, which includes a MiniCPM-V 2.6 reference row with additional columns (ChartQA, MathVision) beyond the model's own doc.
TextVQA val split; exceeds the taxonomy's typical 40-75 range for this benchmark but is the genuine, directly-confirmed official figure.
Not in MiniCPM-V 2.6's own results table; taken from the fuller cross-model comparison table on the MiniCPM-o 2.6 model card.
Video-MME without subtitles; with subtitles the model scores 63.6.
Overall accuracy (8B params, 64 frames) on StreamingBench official leaderboard; rank 8 of 16.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, independently re-fetched HF model card (openbmb/MiniCPM-V-2_6): 8B params (SigLip-400M + Qwen2-7B), MiniCPM Model License weights / Apache-2.0 code. 32k context window independently confirmed via multiple sources (HF card, MarkTechPost coverage) as a first-class feature (multi-image + video understanding), not an unverified guess. Paper/GitHub dated August 2024 (arxiv paper timestamp Aug 3 2024; release announcements early August), consistent with the 2024-08-06 release date. OpenCompass 65.2 average confirmed present verbatim on the HF model card.
